parameters-en.Osc1Wave: Morphs Oscillator 1 from a sine wave (at 0.0) to a triangle wave (at 5.0) to a modified square wave (at 10.0).
parameters-en.1DutyCycl: Controls the duty cycle of Oscillator 1. Adjusting Duty Cycle to either extreme increases harmonic content of the waveform.
parameters-en.Osc1 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 1, with a 6-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc1 Freq: Sets the interval of Oscillator 1, from 1 octave down to 1 octave up, with 0.1 octave resolution.
parameters-en.Osc1 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 1 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Osc2Wave: Morphs Oscillator 2 from a sine wave (at 0.0) to a triangle wave (at 5.0) to a modified square wave (at 10.0).
parameters-en.2DutyCycl: Controls the duty cycle of Oscillator 2. Adjusting Duty Cycle to either extreme increases harmonic content of the waveform.
parameters-en.Osc2 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 2, with a 6-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc2 Freq: Sets the interval of Oscillator 2, from 1 octave down to 1 octave up, with 0.1 octave resolution.
parameters-en.Osc2 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 2 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Osc3Wave: Morphs Oscillator 3 from a sine wave (at 0.0) to a triangle wave (at 5.0) to a modified square wave (at 10.0).
parameters-en.3DutyCycl: Controls the duty cycle of Oscillator 3. Adjusting Duty Cycle to either extreme increases harmonic content of the waveform.
parameters-en.Osc3 Oct: Sets the octave of Oscillator 3, with a 6-octave range.
parameters-en.Osc3 Freq: Sets the interval of Oscillator 3, from 1 octave down to 1 octave up, with 0.1 octave resolution.
parameters-en.Osc3 Pan: Controls the panning of Oscillator 3 between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.FltPreset: Choose between 4 filter responses to shape the synth.
parameters-en.FM 3 > 1: Controls how much of Oscillator 3 is used to modulate Oscillator 1's frequency.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the synth, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the synth, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
